stemHtml: An aircraft is flying from the USA to Germany. Overhead the UK, the pilot is told that he/she is no longer allowed to enter Germany. All mentioned countries signed the International Aviation Convention. This situation is…

options.a: legal, because the US is not part of EASA.
options.b: legal, because Germany has the right to withdrawn traffic.
options.c: illegal, because they signed the convention and therefore are obliged to permit the aircraft to land.
options.d: illegal, because a permission to enter cannot be withdrawn once given.
